reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade â learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (+0.116) but tiny total PnL (+1.35 USD); only buckets n>=8 are considered. Confirmed edge in trending/Hurst, z-score -2..1, TTC 120-240s, BB normal, ADX strong trend, CVD sell pressure, bearish MTF alignment, and DOWN direction. Most other slices remain too small or show negative realized PnL despite decent win rates.
failing: BB expansion/squeeze states (n>=9, WR<=0.5, negative PnL)
UP direction and bullish supertrend (n=24, WR 0.542, negative PnL)
warnings: total n=53 still very small; many sub-buckets remain <8 and ignored
positive EV but realized PnL near zero after costs
observe-only mode means no live execution risk yet
focus_next: accumulate samples in trending + zscore -2..1 + TTC 120-240s intersection
track whether BB normal and CVD sell_pressure edges persist above n=30
monitor DOWN_STRONG vs UP_STRONG divergence as n grows

history.summary: With 53 settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (overall wr 0.604, avg_ev 0.116) concentrated in DOWN_STRONG, trending regimes, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, dead volume, bearish-aligned MTF and sell-pressure CVD; all other buckets have n<8 or wr near breakeven and are ignored. DOWN direction, strong_trend ADX and range_middle also clear the n>=8 + positive-EV filter while UP_STRONG and expansion/squeeze BB states do not. Sample remains too small for high-confidence regime differentiation.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (Hurst), normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX trend, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, z-score -2..1, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (win rates 0.64-0.83, n>=12-50, all reconciled). UP signals, long holds (>=240s), active volume, range-top/breakouts, and mixed MTF remain negative or marginal. Sample still small overall; patterns stable vs noise but require more data.

With 53 settled trades the composite signal shows modest positive EV (overall WR 0.604, +1.35 USD) driven by a handful of high-sample regimes; DOWN/trending/strong-trend/normal-BB/sell-pressure setups are the only buckets >=8 samples that are clearly profitable after costs. Most other slices remain too small or mixed to confirm. No material change from prior zero-sample state beyond accumulation of these 53 observations.
changes_since_last: First analysis; sample grown from 0 to 53 settled trades

history.summary: With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (win rate 0.69, avg_ev 0.136) while overall sample remains too small for broad generalization. Strongest confirmed patterns are bearish_aligned MTF, sell_pressure CVD, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC and strong_trend ADX; UP signals and >=240s TTC remain marginal or negative. No material changes possible without prior_analysis; all n<8 buckets ignored.

With n=53 total settled trades, overall WR 60.4% and positive avg_ev 0.116 after costs, but only a handful of buckets meet n>=8 with WR confidently above breakeven and stable positive EV. Confirmed edges appear in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and DOWN_STRONG signals; most other slices remain too sparse or mixed to trust.

With n=53 total settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.69, ev 0.136) while overall sample remains too small for most buckets; normal BB state, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and 120-240s TTC stand out as profitable with n>=8 and wr well above breakeven. UP signals and >=240s TTC remain unprofitable despite positive avg_ev. No prior analysis available so all patterns treated as initial observations.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, and CVD sell pressure show confirmed positive EV (win rates 0.64-0.83, n>=12-50, avg_ev>0.11). Patterns like >=240s TTC, active volume, and mixed MTF alignment are failing with negative realized PnL despite some positive avg_ev. Sample remains small overall; no material changes possible without prior analysis.

With 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (+0.116) but tiny total PnL (+1.35 USD); only buckets n>=8 are considered. Confirmed edge in trending/Hurst, z-score -2..1, TTC 120-240s, BB normal, ADX strong trend, CVD sell pressure, bearish MTF alignment, and DOWN direction. Most other slices remain too small or show negative realized PnL despite decent win rates.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Bitcoin trading ~$59.4k-$60k amid ongoing Q2 losses and ETF outflows (latest data Jun 26: -$444M)
MSTR/Strategy facing scrutiny over BTC holdings, unrealized losses ~$14.5B; ongoing stock sales to fund buys
No major macro prints, regulatory headlines, or large liquidations reported in last 30min

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 136 settled trades, 63.2% win rate, +$51.81 PnL, but profit factor 1.22 is marginal and average loss ($4.70) exceeds average win ($3.34). Calibration is poor (edge_model shows systematic overconfidence in 0.3-0.4 bucket: 29% empirical vs ~35% predicted). Only 4 context buckets have sample size n=1, all losing, making dimensional analysis statistically meaningless.

knob_recommendations.reason: 230/237 execution rejects were underdog_price_below_floor at avg_entry=0.5982; raise floor slightly to reduce noise trades while preserving 63% win rate sample
avg_loss ($4.70) > avg_win ($3.34); reduce size 20% to cap downside until loss distribution tightens
n=1 buckets are uninformative; require 30+ samples before blacklisting any context to avoid overfitting noise

new_lessons.rule: edge_model predicts ~35% up in 0.3-0.4 bucket but empirical is 29.4% (n=51); recalibrate or add regularization term
win_rate=63% but profit_factor=1.22 because loss_size > win_size; prioritize tail-risk filters over hit rate
97% of execution rejects are underdog_price_below_floor; current floor filters low-edge trades but rejects too manyânudge up 3-4 cents
only 4 context buckets populated, all n=1; cannot identify exploit/avoid contexts until 30+ samples per bucketâexpand feature coverage or relax gates

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: 220/227 exec rejects = underdog_price_below_floor; either floor is miscalibrated or model generates non-viable signals; test floor=0.42
edge_quality:high context 0% WR (n=1 small but directional); investigate feature scoring vs realized outcomes
Brier 0.239 vs baseline 0.25 is marginal improvement; model adds ~4% skill over coin flip, consistent with near-efficient 5min
220/227 exec rejections from underdog_price_below_floor implies floor is miscalibrated or edge model outputs stale/biased probabilities; audit floor logic and recalibrate monthly
n=1 per hurst/zscore/ttc/edge/markov/spread/depth bucket is statistical noise; never exploit or avoid contexts with <30 settled trades
avg_loss $4.70 > avg_win $3.34 despite 63% win rate yields fragile 1.22 profit factor; require avg_win >= avg_loss OR win_rate >= 70% before claiming robust edge
116 down vs 20 up (5.8:1 ratio) far exceeds base_rate_up=36.76%; suggests model exploits transient down-drift or overfits bearish microstructure; validate on fresh out-of-sample periods
1948 valid TradingView alerts consumed as features but only 136 settled trades; investigate feature-to-trade conversion bottleneck and whether MTF/composite signals are ignored by gating logic
edge_model predicts ~35% up in 0.3-0.4 bucket but empirical is 29.4% (n=51); recalibrate or add regularization term
win_rate=63% but profit_factor=1.22 because loss_size > win_size; prioritize tail-risk filters over hit rate
97% of execution rejects are underdog_price_below_floor; current floor filters low-edge trades but rejects too manyânudge up 3-4 cents
only 4 context buckets populated, all n=1; cannot identify exploit/avoid contexts until 30+ samples per bucketâexpand feature coverage or relax gates

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

proposal.description: 5m window 11:00-11:05PM is strictly contained inside 15m window 11:00-11:15PM

accepted_dependencies.description: 5m window 10:55-11:00PM is strictly contained inside 15m window 10:45-11:00PM

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

market_context.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - June 28, 10:55PM-11:00PM ET
Bitcoin Up or Down - June 28, 10:45PM-11:00PM ET

grok_decision.rationale: CEX lead + fresh MTF up alignment clears 0.64 breakeven; fair 0.68 supports up.
grok_decision.tv_read: MTF confirmed_up across all 2/3/4m TFs with UP_STRONG signals, all fresh (<66s).
grok_decision.mispricing_read: Strong CEX up divergence (0.356) confirmed + TV confirms, cex_p_up 0.991 vs poly 0.635.
